summary: Bash: Compare v1 and v2 CG file lists
input_snippet:
{"command": "# v1 CG files (currently in wiki)
find /home/user/brain-in-a-vat/projects/wiki/docs/public/cg -name "*.png" -type f | sed 's|.*/public/||' | sort > /tmp/v1_cg_list.txt
# v2 CG files
find /tmp/cg-v2 -name "*.png" -type f | sed 's|.*/cg-v2/||' | sort > /tmp/v2_cg_list.txt

echo "=== v1 count ===" && wc -l /tmp/v1_cg_list.txt
echo "=== v2 count ===" && wc -l /tmp/v2_cg_list.txt
echo "=== v1 files in v2 ===" && comm -12 /tmp/v1_cg_list.txt /tmp/v2_cg_list.txt | wc -l
e...
